originalTitle: Space stocks tumble after a Blue Origin rocket explodes and SpaceX’s valuation gets a reality check
summary: The red-hot space sector was feeling some heat on Friday, cooling from some of the spectacular gains seen in May.
content: The red-hot space sector was feeling some heat on Friday, cooling from some of the spectacular gains seen in May.
chineseTitle: 蓝色起源火箭爆炸后，太空股暴跌，SpaceX 的估值受到现实检验
chineseSummary: 炙手可热的太空行业周五感受到了一些热度，从 5 月份的一些惊人涨幅中回落。
chineseContent: 炙手可热的太空行业周五感受到了一些热度，从 5 月份的一些惊人涨幅中回落。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
